description_long: This is a large, industrial-style metal shelving unit with a robust, rectangular frame and multiple open shelves. The structure is composed of thick, square metal beams and features a prominent upper platform on one end, possibly for additional storage or equipment placement. The lower section includes a series of horizontal and vertical supports, providing stability and strength, while the open design allows for easy access from multiple sides. The surface finish appears matte and slightly rough, typical of unfinished or lightly treated steel. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for heavy-duty use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or industrial storage areas.
description: A large, industrial metal shelving unit with open shelves and a robust, rectangular frame, suitable for heavy-duty urban storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shelving unit, with open shelves and a raised platform on the right.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the depth and open structure, with the raised platform visible on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the open shelves and the raised platform now on the left.
description_view_3: End view with a clear look at the internal supports and a staircase-like structure beneath the shelves.
